commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Codex app-server resolver, tests, docs, and changelog so implicit local stdio defaults honor Codex `requirements.toml` constraints for approval policy, reviewer, sandbox, platform path, and hostname-scoped remote sandbox entries.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main resolves implicit local stdio defaults to YOLO and forwards those values to Codex requests, so a managed requirements file that rejects `never`, `user`, or `danger-full-access` can reject turn start.
commands.review_followup: The protected `maintainer` label and absence of a narrow source-backed blocker make this normal maintainer review and merge-gate work, not a ClawSweeper repair job.

target.title: fix: respect Codex requirements for app-server defaults
target.author: kevinslin
